name: apinox
description: A visual SOAP client desktop application

scripts.build:packages: cd packages/request-editor && npm install && npm run build
scripts.compile-webview: npm run build:packages && cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && npm run build:skip-check
scripts.dev:webview: npm run build:packages && cd src-tauri/webview && npm run dev
scripts.dev:editor: cd packages/request-editor && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.tauri:test: npm run build:packages && cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && cd ../.. && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev: node scripts/version.js increment && node scripts/version.js sync && npm run build:packages && cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && cd ../.. && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:ios: node scripts/version.js increment && node scripts/version.js sync && npm run compile-webview && npx tauri ios dev
scripts.tauri:android: node scripts/version.js increment && node scripts/version.js sync && npx tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:android:build: node scripts/version.js increment && node scripts/version.js sync && npx tauri android build --debug
scripts.package:arch: mkdir -p target/release/bundle/arch && PKGDEST=$(pwd)/target/release/bundle/arch makepkg -f --nodeps --nocheck --noconfirm && node scripts/gen-arch-install.js
